description_long: This is a yellow, ergonomically contoured plastic bottle with a green cap, designed for household cleaning products. The front label displays the 'Cif' brand prominently, along with product information and images of clean surfaces, suggesting its use as a cleaning cream. The bottle has a smooth, slightly glossy surface and a narrow neck leading to a rounded, green-tipped cap. The back of the bottle features detailed instructions, warnings, and branding in multiple languages, as well as hazard symbols. The sides of the bottle are unadorned, showing the bottle's curved, easy-to-grip profile. The overall design is practical for handheld use and dispensing liquid or cream cleaning agents.
description: A yellow, contoured plastic cleaning bottle with a green cap and prominent 'Cif' branding, featuring detailed front and back labels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the 'Cif' logo, product name, and images of clean surfaces on a yellow bottle with a green cap.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the bottle's narrow, curved profile and the green cap, with no visible labels.
description_view_2: Back view displays detailed product information, instructions, and hazard symbols on a large label.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the bottle's contoured shape and green cap, with no visible labels.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label features the 'Cif' logo in white and red on a black oval, with 'Crema LIMONE' in yellow and white text, and images of clean surfaces. Back label contains product information, instructions, and hazard symbols in black and red text on a white background.
